output:
Executed T4 in `/workspace/reigh-app`. Shared Base UI overlay ownership for dialog, alert-dialog, popover, select, dropdown-menu, tooltip, and hover-card/preview-card now lives under `src/shared/components/ui/overlay/`, with the legacy `src/shared/components/ui/*` modules reduced to re-export facades. `src/shared/components/ui/command.tsx` no longer type-imports Base UI directly, the tooltip mock test was moved into `ui/overlay`, and migrated overlay wrappers now take layering from the overlay stack helper instead of wrapper-local numeric `z-*` ownership while preserving markers like `data-dialog-content` and `data-dialog-backdrop`.

Verification completed with `npx tsc --noEmit` and `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/shared/components/ui/dialog.test.tsx src/shared/components/ui/select.test.tsx src/shared/components/ui/overlay/tooltip.test.tsx src/shared/components/ui/overlay/overlayBridge.test.tsx src/shared/state/overlayStack.test.ts`, all passing. The raw Base UI import grep outside `ui/overlay` now returns only `src/domains/media-lightbox/components/LightboxShell.tsx`, which is the planned T6 migration and remains outside this batch.

task_updates.executor_notes: Centralized the shared Base UI overlay runtime owners under `src/shared/components/ui/overlay/` by adding overlay-backed wrapper modules for dialog, alert-dialog, popover, select, dropdown-menu, tooltip, and hover-card/preview-card. The legacy `src/shared/components/ui/*` wrapper files are now thin re-export facades, `src/shared/components/ui/command.tsx` no longer type-imports `@base-ui/react/dialog`, and the tooltip mock test moved to `src/shared/components/ui/overlay/tooltip.test.tsx` so no raw Base UI mocks remain outside `ui/overlay/`. Migrated wrappers now derive layering from the overlay stack via shared helper styles and preserve required markers such as `data-dialog-content` and `data-dialog-backdrop`; there are no wrapper-local numeric `z-*` classes left under `src/shared/components/ui/overlay/`. Verification: `npx tsc --noEmit` passed; `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/shared/components/ui/dialog.test.tsx src/shared/components/ui/select.test.tsx src/shared/components/ui/overlay/tooltip.test.tsx src/shared/components/ui/overlay/overlayBridge.test.tsx src/shared/state/overlayStack.test.ts` passed; `rg 'from .*@base-ui/react/(dialog|popover|select|menu|tooltip|alert-dialog|context-menu|popup|preview-card|hover-card)' src/ --type ts -l | grep -v 'ui/overlay/' | sort` now returns only `src/domains/media-lightbox/components/LightboxShell.tsx`, which is the planned T6 owner outside this batch.
